scripts.deploy:web:staging: pnpm build:web && pnpm --filter api exec wrangler pages deploy ../web/dist --project-name ratama-tracker-web-staging --branch develop
scripts.deploy:web:production: pnpm build:web && pnpm --filter api exec wrangler pages deploy ../web/dist --project-name ratama-tracker-web-production --branch main
scripts.deploy:api:staging: pnpm --filter api exec wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy:api:production: pnpm --filter api exec wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.db:create:staging: pnpm --filter api exec wrangler d1 create rmc_staging
scripts.db:create:production: pnpm --filter api exec wrangler d1 create rmc_production
scripts.db:migrate:local: pnpm --filter api exec wrangler d1 migrations apply rmc_local --local
scripts.db:migrate:staging: pnpm --filter api exec wrangler d1 migrations apply rmc_staging --remote
scripts.db:migrate:production: pnpm --filter api exec wrangler d1 migrations apply rmc_production --remote
scripts.r2:create:staging: pnpm --filter api exec wrangler r2 bucket create rmc-staging-files
scripts.r2:create:production: pnpm --filter api exec wrangler r2 bucket create rmc-production-files
